mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.file_url AS fileUrl, p.user_id AS userId, u.username AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, p.ethnic_group AS ethnicGroup, p.region, p.visibility, p.comments, p.collects, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.top, p.create_time AS createTime, p.modify_time AS modifyTime, (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(t.name) FROM post_tag pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.post_id = p.id) AS tags FROM interaction i JOIN post p ON i.target_id = p.id AND i.target_type = 1 AND i.action_type = 2 JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
